review_title: Exceptional performance & Employee Engagement tool
author: Ashish U.
pros: ntuitive User Interface: The tool offers a user-friendly interface that is easy to navigate, ensuring a seamless user experience for both employees and managers.Streamlined Performance Management: The tool simplifies the performance management process, making it more efficient and time-saving for all stakeholders involved.Real-time Feedback and Goal Tracking: The tool enables employees to receive timely feedback and track their goals, fostering continuous improvement and motivation.
cons: Learning Curve: Depending on the complexity of the tool, some employees may require additional time and training to fully understand and utilize all its features effectively.

author: Arihant D.

cons: I wish that this tool also had other features like project and timeline management, that way it could have been just one tool we need for end-to-end people and goal management.

cons: They need to add 360 review.......that will make it complete

review_title: Holistic user review. Using it for performance management
description: I am using this for performance management. A good tool to begin with for companies looking to setup performance management systems
author: Prateek D.
pros: Home Tab The dashboard setup looks great. Provides users with information on checkins and any action items with your own team, showcases goals at company and department level and provides a shortcut option to set up 1-on-1s an setup goals for your department or reportees. Goals Tab Clean, simple and easy to understand user interface. Provides the ability to the user to view the options available on the page. The left side gives a clear view of goals at a company, department and individual level, bringing in transparency. Users can also review goals according to the review cycle they are currently in. This provides them the ability to review their performance or track progress of their/dept/company goals based upon the performance cycle. Explore Goals - A great feature to view and understand the goals of different employees across various functions and divisions at the company. This also helps employees to align their goals with the goals of the company Company Goals - Gives information on the goals of the company to the employees. 1-on-1 Meetings Users have the ability to create 1-on-1 meetings with their reportees or any other employee within the company. Users can also sync their calendars to add events from their calendar. This can then be updated in their dashboard. E.g. A user would know that they have checked in with their respective peers/managers/reportees.
cons: Home Tab - It will be nice to see individual level goals of the user as well on the dashboard on the home page, thus, making it easier to do a quick review. Goals Tab - Ability to update company goals, even if the owner of the goals is somebody else. E.g. I can add 'Key Results' by accessing any of the company goals. Ideally, this shoul be allowed only to those individuals who are allocated company goals or are owners of those specific goals - Review of individual goals It would be nice to see text that indicates the serial number of my goals. For e.g. - Goals no 1 - Launch new business initiatives. While reviewing my individual goals, the option to upate activities is missing. Users should have the ability to state the key activities undertaken by them against each of the key results. There should also be an option to provide anonymous feedback to any user/employee at the company, especially those in your team, including your manager.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: How People made us a better organisation
description: We loved using Peoplebox and recently paid for another year because we achieved tremendous goals as a team and as individuals.
author: Taiwo A.
pros: Allows our teams to understand their goals and track success.
cons: Everything works well, I cannot think about any glitch. Maybe the performance aspect could be improved.

review_title: Good platform to foster personalized remote-work 1-on-1s!
description: I could say with the founders it has been an interesting experience however in the context of the product its an okay experience given that there is so much this platform could have done. Needs to trust the employer and let them choose what's best for their organization. Be suggestive about things than forceful as a platform.
author: Aaryan Salman Z.
pros: We are a remote team working from various time zones and PeopleBox is an amazing platform for organizations like ours to care for the team members and foster deeper engagement and collaborations. The OKR feature is simple, effective, and easy to use. You can set goals for individuals, teams, and the Organization, as a whole. The pre-built surveys are a great starting point. Great to have all one-on-ones in one place. Simple and easy-to-understand insights.
cons: It does not trust the employers who have bought the platform. Unfortunately, it offers no flexibility to decide when we need to receive anonymous feedback and when we can have open feedback. Heavy on anonymous feedback which is a least likely thing about PeopleBox. Other things I least like about this software is that it lacks: Team meetings agenda feature Threeway feedback loop Solid Mobile interface or app Relationship Tracker Rewards and Recognition

review_title: A Guide for Effective Meetings
description: The problem that we are trying to solve with Peoplebox is to provide Social-Emotional Support to our members and improve the engagement between managers and subordinates. We have been able to develop a significant relationship between the members of our organizations. Also, people have started trusting each other more; as a result, the level of ownership among members has increased significantly.
author: Kuvam M.
pros: The best thing about Peoplebox is the range of questions it recommends for your meeting with your colleagues or subordinate. The questions are very relevant to the discussion and help you in having an effective conversation.
cons: The one thing that they can improve on is to have themselves integrated with other platforms. At the moment, they offer integration with slack but not with Zulip Chat.

review_title: Using People Box for last 2 years and experience has been great
description: Loving the experience right now with seamless integration with google sheets
author: Mohd A.
pros: Single platform for OKR and performance metric tracking, reviewing, and socializing + great with 3rd party integration like Google Sheets or Slack
cons: The templates can be a little tricky to work with and show the exact progress, which takes some time to align everyone on the presented view + can be slow at the time

review_title: Peoplebox Review
description: The product is amazing and can make a big impact in the market.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: All the features on the Peoplebox platform has its own unique feature whether it is OKRs, Business Reviews, 1on1s, and Performance Management review. it helps our company to stay focused and achieve all the milestones as per the requirement
cons: Peoplebox is new in the market, so quick TAT is required on the bug fixing and new enhancements should be implemented on a fast pace to stay competitive in the market

review_title: A great product that has revolutionised our people and experience
description: I love the tool and can not see us scaling without it. As we grow it becomes even more important to ensure that we are making our company the better place to work and supporting our people. People box ensure that we keep our finger on the pulse
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the fact that the tool is simple to use. Provides guidance where needed and most importantly it is effective. The team are also very responsive It has enabled us to improve how we support our people and has truly allowed us to move our People and Experience to a new level. The tool is now our fundamental part of our HR
cons: What I dislike is nothing to do with the tool. It's the insights that you get back, which can sometimes slap you in the face (in a good way). You as a business owner think that your doing well and that your putting everything in place to ensure that your a great to work. Using people box has enabled us to uncover our blind spots and in turn improve our people and experience.

description: The tools help our people-operations team to sustain quarterly goals and PDPs of individual employees. Along with this, we're upholding and executing 1:1 with managers & team leaders with so much ease with the help of the tool.
author: Anjali P.
pros: I really like and love how well the organization has synchronized all its members. The User Interface is something that I particularly appreciate due to its straightforward and easy-to-understand design. Additionally, it serves as an excellent means of keeping track of KPIs and goals.
cons: So far, I haven't faced any issues or least likely features of this product. We use the platform regularly, and I believe that it fulfills all of its purposes with a high level of quality and maintenance.
